prompt:
Analyze the following text and extract ALL temporal information.

For each date or time reference found, provide:
- The date string (in YYYY-MM-DD format when possible)
- A Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) if the date is specific enough
- A brief context describing what the date refers to

For intervals (e.g. "from 2016 to 2019", "between March and June"), provide:
- start and end timestamps
- context

Also determine the overall time span of the text:
- start_ts: earliest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)
- end_ts: latest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)

Text:
"""[2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023] Gina said: "Hey Jon! Long time no see! Things have been hectic lately. I just launched an ad campaign for my clothing store in hopes of growing the business. Starting my own store and taking risks is both scary and rewarding. I'm excited to see where it takes me!"
[2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023] Jon said: "Hey Gina! Whoa, your store looks great! All your hard work really paid off - congrats! Must be awesome to see your stuff on display."
[2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023] Gina said: "Thanks a bunch! It's awesome seeing my vision happen. How's the dance studio going? Did you find the right spot?"
[2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023] Jon said: "Hey Gina! Thanks for asking. I'm on the hunt for the ideal spot for my dance studio and it's been quite a journey! I've been looking at different places and picturing how the space would look. I even found a place with great natural light! Oh, I've been to Paris yesterday! It was sooo cool."
[2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023] Gina said: "Wow, nice spot! Where is it? Got any other features you want to think about before you decide? Paris?! That is really great Jon! Never had a chance to visit it. Been only to Rome once."
[2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023] Jon said: "It's downtown which is awesome cuz it's easy to get to. Plus the natural light! Gotta check the size & floor quality too. We need a good dance floor with enough bounce for me & my students to dance safely."
[2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023] Gina said: "Definitely! Dance floors help avoid injuries and make dancing more enjoyable. You thinking about it is great. Any particular type of flooring you like?"
[2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023] Jon said: "Yeah, good flooring's crucial. I'm after Marley flooring, which is what dance studios usually use. It's great 'cause it's grippy but still lets you move, plus it's tough and easy to keep clean."
[2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023] Gina said: "Sounds great! Marley's perfect; it's got the right amount of grip and movement. Can't wait to see your dance studio done!"
[2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023] Jon said: "Yeah, can't wait to see it done! Looking for the right place and getting everything ready has been a mix of exciting and nerve-wracking, but I'm determined to make it work. It'll be worth it!"
[2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023] Gina said: "Believe in yourself, Jon! The process may be tough, but you got this. Push through and it'll be worth it. Don't forget to take breaks and dance it out when you need to destress!"
[2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023] Jon said: "Glad I have you in my corner! Gotta make time to dance and vent, that's for sure. We'll make it through this - hang in there!"
[2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023] Gina said: "Thanks, Jon! Appreciate your support!"
[2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023] Jon said: "Let's keep going and chase our dreams!"
[2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023] Gina said: "Yeah! We've done so much, and there's nothing but good stuff coming. Let's keep going after our goals and making them happen."
[2:32 pm on 29 January, 2023] Jon said: "Success is almost here. We got this!""""

Return JSON:
```json
{{
    "dates": [
        {{
            "date_str": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "timestamp": <unix timestamp as float or null>,
            "context": "brief description of what this date refers to"
        }}
    ],
    "intervals": [
        {{
            "start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "end_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "start_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "end_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "context": "brief description"
        }}
    ],
    "start_ts": <earliest unix timestamp or null>,
    "end_ts": <latest unix timestamp or null>
}}
```

If no temporal information is found, return empty lists and null timestamps.

JSON Output: /no_think
